description_long: This is a compact, modern rifle with a matte black metal body and a distinctive olive green fabric-wrapped stock, likely for added grip or comfort. The rifle features a detachable box magazine, a prominent trigger guard, and a short barrel with a squared-off muzzle. The top rail is equipped with iron sights, and the receiver has visible mechanical details, including a selector switch and ejection port. The handguard is ventilated, suggesting heat dissipation during rapid fire. The overall design is tactical, with ergonomic elements and a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact black rifle with an olive green fabric-wrapped stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights, designed for tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, olive green wrapped stock, and details of the magazine and iron sights.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the width of the wrapped stock and alignment of the iron sights along the top rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, trigger, and the fabric-wrapped stock from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle, handguard, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
